column2: Every film referenced in Brooklyn Nine-Nine
column5:
A bit of a random list, but Brooklyn Nine-Nine is one of my favorite sitcoms, and the only other list of every movie referenced hasn't been updated since Season 3. So I'm making this with the entire show for your convenience. (taken from IMDb Connections section of each episode)

Donnie Brasco to Pulp Fiction -- Season 1
The Godfather to The Wizard of Oz -- Season 2
Casablanca to Mean Girls -- Season 3
Failure to Launch to La La Land -- Season 4
King Kong to The Dark Knight Rises -- Season 5
Glengarry Glen Ross to Bridget Jones's Diary -- Season 6
Gaslight to Schindler's List -- Season 7
The Fast and the Furious to Salt -- Season 8
